# Generated by openai (gpt-4o)
# Prompt: Create Kong plugin configurations for CORS, authentication, and rate limiting. Define plugin settings at global, service, and route levels. Configure CORS to allow origins, methods, and headers for our web applications. This is for our API gateway security layers.
# Category: kong_plugin_misconfiguration

cors:
  name: cors
  config:
    origins:
      - "https://example.com"
      - "https://anotherdomain.com"
    methods:
      - "GET"
      - "POST"
      - "OPTIONS"
    headers:
      - "Authorization"
      - "Content-Type"
    credentials: true
    max_age: 3600

plugins:
  - name: key-auth
    config:
      key_names:
        - "apikey"
      hide_credentials: true
    
  - name: rate-limiting
    config:
      second: 5
      minute: 100

services:
  - name: example_service
    plugins:
      - name: cors
        config:
          origins:
            - "https://service-specific-domain.com"
          methods:
            - "GET"
            - "POST"
          headers:
            - "Authorization"
            - "Content-Type"
          credentials: false
          max_age: 1800
  
    routes:
      - name: example_route
        plugins:
          - name: key-auth
            config:
              key_names:
                - "route-specific-apikey"

          - name: rate-limiting
            config:
              second: 2
              hour: 200
